writeup: The Buffalo Bills entered the NFL offseason's quietest stretch following the conclusion of their 2026 mandatory minicamp, with the organization making five roster moves as camp wrapped up. Attention quickly shifted toward training camp, with analysts grading the Bills' offseason and projecting rosters while identifying players on the roster bubble heading into the summer. The Bills also made headlines off the field, participating in Buffalo's 50th anniversary Juneteenth Celebration as the organization remained active in the community. Meanwhile, player storylines such as Damar Hamlin's potential to silence doubters and questions about whether the defensive roster has improved kept fans engaged during the lull. With a 'Super Bowl or bust' mentality pervading coverage, anticipation is building for what many expect to be a pivotal 2026 campaign in Buffalo.
